info.title: Yaat - Yet another APIM tool
info.description: A tool to implement simple CI/CD for APIs hosted in Azure API Management, the intended usage is during CI/CD e.g. with GitHub Actions

commands.name: update
commands.description: Updates the api of an API Management service

options.name: --api-name
options.description: The name of the api in the API Management service.

options.name: --spec-format
options.description: The type of the specification, possible values are (openapi, openapi+json, openapi+json-link, openapi-link, swagger-json, swagger-link-json, wadl-link-json, wadl-xml, wsdl and wsdl-link).

options.name: --spec-url
options.description: The url of the downstream service specification e.g. the swagger file.

options.name: --svc
options.description: The url of the downstream service that will be exposed via the API.

options.name: --apim-name
options.description: The name of the API Management service, if not provided it will pick the only one present in the selected subscription, or throw if more than one are found.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enables detailed logging.

options.name: --retry
options.description: The number of times to retry, max allowed value is 10.

options.name: --sub-id
options.description: The id of the subscription, if not provided it will use the default subscription of the logged in session.

options.name: --sub-name
options.description: The Name of the subscription, used to find the most suitable subscription if more than one are found. This has no effect is sub-id is specified.

options.name: --api-name
options.description: Required. The name of the api in the API Management service.

options.name: --svc
options.description:
Required. The url of the downstream service that will be
exposed via the API.

options.name: --spec-url
options.description:
Required. The url of the downstream service specification
e.g. the swagger file.

options.name: --spec-format
options.description:
Required. The type of the specification, possible values are
(openapi, openapi+json, openapi+json-link, openapi-link,
swagger-json, swagger-link-json, wadl-link-json, wadl-xml,
wsdl and wsdl-link).

options.name: --apim-name
options.description:
The name of the API Management service, if not provided it
will pick the only one present in the selected subscription,
or throw if more than one are found.

options.name: --sub-id
options.description:
The id of the subscription, if not provided it will use the
default subscription of the logged in session.

options.name: --sub-name
options.description:
The Name of the subscription, used to find the most suitable
subscription if more than one are found. This has no effect
is sub-id is specified.

options.name: --retry
options.description: The number of times to retry, max allowed value is 10.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enables detailed logging.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
